note: Curated collections are saved queries over the knowledge graph, not hand-picked product lists. The engine resolves each collection's `query` against products.json at render time, so new products join matching collections automatically — same pattern as RenoGuide's dynamic internal-linking hubs.

collections.name: Desk Therapy
collections.blurb: Small joys for the 9-to-5: things to boop, squish and stare at between meetings.

collections.name: Coquette Starter Pack
collections.blurb: Bows, hearts and satin everything. Romance as a lifestyle choice.

collections.name: Blind Box Beginners
collections.blurb: Start your collection with the series everyone falls for first.

collections.name: Dreamy Bedroom Glow
collections.blurb: Lamps, moons and soft light for rooms that feel like falling asleep in a cloud.

collections.name: Great Gifts Under $25
collections.blurb: Maximum delight, minimum spend. Zero chance they already have it.

collections.name: Cottagecore Corner
collections.blurb: Mushrooms, daisies and wicker — the soft life, indoors.

collections.name: Coworker-Approved
collections.blurb: Office-safe cuteness for new jobs, farewells and Friday morale.

collections.name: Display Your Collection
collections.blurb: Shelves, dioramas and lighting that turn a pile of figures into a museum.

collections.name: Plush Parade
collections.blurb: Soft, squishable and emotionally supportive. The plush hall of fame.

collections.name: Stationery Heaven
collections.blurb: Pens, planners, stickers and memo pads too cute to actually use.

collections.name: Character Corner
collections.blurb: Hello Kitty to Totoro — every icon of the cuteverse in one place.

collections.name: Tiny Treasures
collections.blurb: Charms, clips and pocket-sized joy — all under $25.
